name: Roshni Singh
tagline: I build intelligent systems that turn data into decisions from research notebooks to production APIs.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering
education.detail: Coursework spanning deep learning, reinforcement learning, transformers and applied signal processing.

researchInterests: Predictive maintenance & failure prediction on IoT sensor data
